Entry.title: Branding Preset Entry
Entry.description: Represents branding logo and text positioning presets for background imagery.

logo.description: Whether logo is enabled by default

imageColorFill.description: Optional background/fill color hex for the logo

textEnabled.description: Whether custom text is enabled by default

textFont.description: Font family of the dynamic branding text

textColorFill.description: Hex color of the dynamic branding text

textSize.description: Font size in pixels of the branding text

textPosition.description: Position coordinates of the dynamic branding text (e.g. '512-400')

ExportJob.title: Export Job
ExportJob.description: Represents an image export and optimization job synced with Car AI Nodes.

status.description: The processing status of the job

imageA.description: Base64 JPEG representation of the environment background (compressed)

imageB.description: Base64 PNG or SVG representation of the vehicle cutout

imageC.description: Base64 JPEG representation of the HTML5 canvas preview/composition

createdAt.description: Firestore server timestamp of job creation

imageFinal.description: High-quality final image URL or Base64 returned by Car AI Nodes

errorMessage5.description: Error message injected by Car AI Nodes in case of failure

/entries/{entryId}.description: Collection of preset documents matching ambient backgrounds with placement constraints

/exports/{jobId}.description: Collection of photobooth exported jobs synced with the AI nodes using the exact exports contract
